mod.name: Simple Task
mod.author: Vodkart
mod.config: task_sys = { [1] = {name = "rotworms", start = 176201, monsters_list = {"rotworm","carrion worm","Rotworm Queen"}, level = 8, count = 140, points = 0, items = {}, reward = {{2480,1}}, exp = 20000, money = 20000}, [2] = {name = "Tortoise", start = 176202, monsters_list = {"Tortoise","thornback tortoise"}, level = 12, count = 200, points = 0, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 25000, money = 25000}, [3] = {name = "cyclops", start = 176203, monsters_list = {"cyclops","cyclops smith","cyclops drone"}, level = 19, count = 300, points = 0, items = {}, reward = {{2401,1}}, exp = 30000, money = 30000}, [4] = {name = "Bog Raider", start = 176204, monsters_list = {"Bog Raider"}, level = 23, count = 350, points = 1, items = {}, reward = {{8891,1}}, exp = 60000, money = 35000}, [5] = {name = "Blue Djinn", start = 176205, monsters_list = {"Blue Djinn","Marid","Green Djinn"}, level = 25, count = 400, points = 1, items = {}, reward = {{5958,1}}, exp = 80000, money = 40000}, [6] = {name = "pirates", start = 176206, monsters_list = {"Pirate Marauder","Pirate Cutthroat","Pirate Buccaneer","Pirate Corsair"}, level = 30, count = 500, points = 2, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 70000, money = 50000}, [7] = {name = "Stone Golems", start = 176207, monsters_list = {"Stone Golem"}, level = 33, count = 100, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 80000, money = 70000}, [8] = {name = "Earth Elemental", start = 176208, monsters_list = {"Earth Elemental"}, level = 36, count = 500, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 80000, money = 100000}, [9] = {name = "Ice Golems", start = 176209, monsters_list = {"ice golem"}, level = 40, count = 550, points = 2, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 100000, money = 120000}, [10] = {name = "Wailing Widows", start = 176210, monsters_list = {"Wailing Widow"}, level = 42, count = 600, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 110000, money = 130000}, [11] = {name = "Mutated Rats", start = 176211, monsters_list = {"Mutated Rat"}, level = 46, count = 600, points = 2, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 8000, money = 200000}, [12] = {name = "Dragons", start = 176212, monsters_list = {"dragon"}, level = 50, count = 650, points = 1, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 9000, money = 300000}, [13] = {name = "Necromancer" ,start = 176213, monsters_list = {"Necromancer"}, level = 60, count = 700, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 20000, money = 400000}, [14] = {name = "Crystal Spiders" ,start = 176214, monsters_list = {"Crystal Spider"}, level = 63, count = 700, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 25000, money = 500000}, [15] = {name = "Giant Spider" ,start = 176215, monsters_list = {"Giant Spider","The old widow"}, level = 80, count = 700, points = 0, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 20000, money = 600000}, [16] = {name = "Underwater Quaras" ,start = 176216, monsters_list = {"quara predator","quara constrictor","quara hydromancer","quara mantassin","quara pincher"}, level = 82, count = 550, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 22000, money = 700000}, [17] = {name = "Underwater Quaras Scout" ,start = 176217, monsters_list = {"quara predator scout","quara constrictor scout","quara hydromancer scout","quara mantassin scout","quara pincher scout"}, level = 83, count = 600, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 25000, money = 800000}, [18] = {name = "Hellspawn" ,start = 176218, monsters_list = {"Hellspawn"}, level = 85, count = 600, points = 4, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 28000, money = 900000}, [19] = {name = "Dragon Lords" ,start = 176219, monsters_list = {"Dragon lord"}, level = 88, count = 650, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 30000, money = 1000000}, [20] = {name = "Lizard Dragons" ,start = 176220, monsters_list = {"Lizard Chosen","Lizard Dragon Priest","Lizard High Guard","Lizard Legionnaire", "Lizard Zaogun"}, level = 90, count = 600, points = 4, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 28000, money = 1200000}, [21] = {name = "Nightmare" ,start = 176221, monsters_list = {"Nightmare","nightmare scion"}, level = 95, count = 90, points = 2, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 30000, money = 1300000}, [22] = {name = "Hydras" ,start = 176222, monsters_list = {"Hydra"}, level = 100, count = 5000, points = 3, items = {}, reward = {{10523,1}}, exp = 40000, money = 500000}, [23] = {name = "Serpent Spawn" ,start = 176223, monsters_list = {"Serpent Spawn"}, level = 103, count = 1500, points = 4, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 50000, money = 600000}, [24] = {name = "Hellhounds" ,start = 176224, monsters_list = {"Hellhound"}, level = 105, count = 500, points = 2, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 90000, money = 700000}, [25] = {name = "Demons" ,start = 176225, monsters_list = {"Demon"}, level = 107, count = 666, points = 4, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 100000, money = 800000}, [26] = {name = "Hero" ,start = 176226, monsters_list = {"Hero"}, level = 110, count = 500, points = 6, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 120000, money = 900000}, [27] = {name = "Behemoth" ,start = 176227, monsters_list = {"Behemoth"}, level = 120, count = 800, points = 8, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 140000, money = 1000000}, [28] = {name = "Grim Reaper" ,start = 176228, monsters_list = {"Grim Reaper"}, level = 100, count = 1000, points = 7, items = {}, reward = {{11374,1}}, exp = 180000, money = 1400000}, [29] = {name = "Hellfire Fighter" ,start = 176229, monsters_list = {"Hellfire Fighter"}, level = 105, count = 900, points = 5, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 200000, money = 1600000}, [30] = {name = "Medusa" ,start = 176230, monsters_list = {"Medusa"}, level = 110, count = 1200, points = 4, items = {}, reward = {{12324,1}}, exp = 200000, money = 1600000}, [31] = {name = "Ghastly Dragon" ,start = 176231, monsters_list = {"Ghastly Dragon"}, level = 100, count = 1400, points = 5, items = {}, reward = {}, exp = 500000, money = 1600000}, [32] = {name = "Undead Dragon" ,start = 176232, monsters_list = {"Undead Dragon"}, level = 130, count = 1600, points = 6, items = {}, reward = {{9693,1}}, exp = 1000000, money = 2000000}, [33] = {name = "Ghazbaran" ,start = 176233, monsters_list = {"Ghazbaran"}, level = 140, count = 5, points = 7, items = {}, reward = {{5943,1}}, exp = 1000000, money = 2000000} } daily_task = { [1] = {name = "Orcs" ,monsters_list = {"Orc Berserker","Orc Rider","Orc Leader","Orc Warlord"}, count = 300, points = 0, reward = {}, exp = 5000, money = 100000}, [2] = {name = "TarantulaS" ,monsters_list = {"Tarantula"}, count = 400, points = 1, reward = {{5015,1}}, exp = 9000, money = 100000}, [3] = {name = "Wyvern" ,monsters_list = {"Wyvern"}, count = 300, points = 2, reward = {}, exp = 9000, money = 35000}, [4] = {name = "Dragons" ,monsters_list = {"Dragon","Dragon Hatchling"}, count = 400, points = 0, reward = {}, exp = 2000, money = 400000}, [5] = {name = "Wailing Widows" ,monsters_list = {"Wailing Widows"}, count = 500, points = 1, reward = {}, exp = 20000, money = 550000}, [6] = {name = "Ancient Scarabs" ,monsters_list = {"Ancient Scarab"}, count = 600, points = 5, reward = {}, exp = 22000, money = 680000}, [7] = {name = "High Class Lizards" ,monsters_list = {"Eternal Guardian","Lizard Chosen","Lizard Dragon Priest","Lizard High Guard","Lizard Legionnaire","Lizard Magistratus","Lizard Noble","Lizard Zaogun"}, count = 400, points = 3, reward = {}, exp = 50000, money = 188000}, [8] = {name = "Mutated BatS" ,monsters_list = {"Mutated Bat"}, count = 400, points = 2, reward = {{5894,70}}, exp = 40000, money = 168000}, [9] = {name = "Giant Spiders" ,monsters_list = {"Giant Spider"}, count = 1600, points = 3, reward = {{5886,10}}, exp = 60000, money = 398000}, [10] = {name = "Undead Dragons" ,monsters_list = {"Undead Dragon"}, count = 5, points = 3, reward = {{2195,1}}, exp = 200000, money = 1200000}, [11] = {name = "HydraS" ,monsters_list = {"Hydra"}, count = 600, points = 3, reward = {}, exp = 100000, money = 220000}, [12] = {name = "Ghastly Dragons" ,monsters_list = {"Ghastly Dragon"}, count = 500, points = 3, reward = {{2323,1}}, exp = 300000, money = 200000}, [14] = {name = "Trolls" ,monsters_list = {"Troll","Troll Champion"}, count = 500, points = 3, reward = {{2173,1}}, exp = 300000, money = 150000}, [15] = {name = "Cyclops" ,monsters_list = {"Cyclops","Cyclops Snith","Cyclops Drone"}, count = 2000, points = 2, reward = {{2129,1}}, exp = 300000, money = 250000}, [16] = {name = "haunted treelins" ,monsters_list = {"haunted treelins"}, count = 2000, points = 2, reward = {{2323,1}}, exp = 300000, money = 250000}, [17] = {name = "Vampires" ,monsters_list = {"vampires"}, count = 1500, points = 3, reward = {{9955,1}}, exp = 300000, money = 350000}, [18] = {name = "Dwarfs" ,monsters_list = {"dwarf","dwarf guard","dwarf soldier"}, count = 2000, points = 2, reward = {{5924,1}}, exp = 400000, money = 400000}, [19] = {name = "Asuras" ,monsters_list = {"midnight asura","downfire asura"}, count = 3000, points = 5, reward = {{7730,1}}, exp = 600000, money = 600000}, [20] = {name = "Dragon Lords" ,monsters_list = {"dragon lord"}, count = 1500, points = 3, reward = {{5919,1}}, exp = 400000, money = 400000}, [21] = {name = "Quaras" ,monsters_list = {"quara predactor","quara mantassin","quara pincher"}, count = 3000, points = 3, reward = {{5945,1}}, exp = 600000, money = 600000}, [21] = {name = "Elfs" ,monsters_list = {"Elf","Elf Scout","Elf Arcanist"}, count = 1000, points = 3, reward = {{5947,1}}, exp = 600000, money = 600000} } task_sys_storages = {176601, 176602, 176603, 176604, 176605, 176606, 176607, 176608} -- task, points, count, daily task, daily count, daily time , daily start, contador function getTaskMission(cid) return getPlayerStorageValue(cid,task_sys_storages[1]) < 0 and 1 or getPlayerStorageValue(cid,task_sys_storages[1]) end function getDailyTaskMission(cid) return getPlayerStorageValue(cid,task_sys_storages[4]) < 0 and 1 or getPlayerStorageValue(cid,task_sys_storages[4]) end function getTaskPoints(cid) return getPlayerStorageValue(cid,task_sys_storages[2]) < 0 and 0 or getPlayerStorageValue(cid,task_sys_storages[2]) end function doRandomDailyTask(cid) local t = { [{6,49}] = {1,3}, [{50,79}] = {4,6}, [{80,129}] = {7,9}, [{130,math.huge}] = {10,12} } for a , b in pairs(t) do if getPlayerLevel(cid) >= a[1] and getPlayerLevel(cid) <= a[2] then return math.random(b[1], b[2]) end end return 0 end function GetRankTask(cid) local ranks = { [{1, 20}] = "Huntsman", [{21, 50}] = "Ranger", [{51, 100}] = "Big Game Hunter", [{101, 200}] = "Trophy Hunter", [{201, math.huge}] = "Elite Hunter" } for v , r in pairs(ranks) do if getTaskPoints(cid) >= v[1] and getTaskPoints(cid) <= v[2] then return r end end return 0 end function getItemsFromList(items) local str = '' if table.maxn(items) > 0 then for i = 1, table.maxn(items) do str = str .. items[i][2] .. ' ' .. getItemNameById(items[i][1]) if i ~= table.maxn(items) then str = str .. ', ' end end end return str end function doRemoveItemsFromList(cid,items) local count = 0 if table.maxn(items) > 0 then for i = 1, table.maxn(items) do if getPlayerItemCount(cid,items[i][1]) >= items[i][2] then count = count + 1 end end end if count == table.maxn(items) then for i = 1, table.maxn(items) do doPlayerRemoveItem(cid,items[i][1],items[i][2]) end else return false end return true end function getMonsterFromList(monster) local str = '' if #monster > 0 then for i = 1, #monster do str = str .. monster[i] if i ~= #monster then str = str .. ', ' end end end return str end function GiveRewardsTask(cid, items) local backpack = doPlayerAddItem(cid, 1999, 1) -- backpackID for _, i_i in ipairs(items) do local item, amount = i_i[1],i_i[2] if isItemStackable(item) or amount == 1 then doAddContainerItem(backpack, item, amount) else for i = 1, amount do doAddContainerItem(backpack, item, 1) end end end end function isSummon(cid) if(not isCreature(cid)) then return false end return getCreatureMaster(cid) ~= cid end
mod.event: function onLogin(cid) registerCreatureEvent(cid, "KillTask") registerCreatureEvent(cid, "TaskLook") return true end
mod.talkaction:
domodlib('task_func') param,task,daily = param:lower(), getTaskMission(cid), getDailyTaskMission(cid) if isInArray({"counter","contador"},param) then setPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[8], getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[8]) <= 0 and 1 or 0) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_BLUE,"[Task System] O contador foi "..(getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[8]) <= 0 and "ativado" or "desativado")..".") return true elseif isInArray({"daily","diaria"},param) then if not daily_task[daily] or getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[7]) <= 0 then doPlayerSendCancel(cid, "Desculpe, Mas você não está em nenhuma Daily Task.") return true elseif getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[6]) - os.time() <= 0 and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5]) < daily_task[daily].count then doPlayerSendCancel(cid,"Desculpe, Mas Você não terminou a Daily Task a tempo! Por favor volte ao npc e comece uma nova Daily Task!") return true end return doShowTextDialog(cid, 8983, "[->] CURRENT DAILY TASK INFO [<-]

Nome: "..daily_task[daily].name.."
Progresso: ["..(getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5]) < 0 and 0 or getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5])).."/"..daily_task[daily].count.."]
Prazo para entrega: "..os.date("%d %B %Y %X ", getPlayerStorageValue(cid,task_sys_storages[6])).."
Monstros para caçar: "..getMonsterFromList(daily_task[daily].monsters_list).."

[->] CURRENT TASK REWARDS [<-]

Money: "..(daily_task[daily].money > 0 and daily_task[daily].money or 0).."
Experiencia: "..(daily_task[daily].exp > 0 and daily_task[daily].exp or 0).."
Task Points: "..daily_task[daily].points.."
Items: "..(#daily_task[daily].reward > 0 and getItemsFromList(daily_task[daily].reward) or "Nenhum item de recompensa")..".") end if not task_sys[task] or getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys[task].start) <= 0 then doPlayerSendCancel(cid, "você não está em nenhuma task.") return true end return doShowTextDialog(cid, 8983, "-> CURRENT TASK ["..getTaskMission(cid).."/"..#task_sys.."] <-

Task Name: "..task_sys[task].name.."
Task Level: "..task_sys[task].level.."
Task Progress: ["..(getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3]) < 0 and 0 or getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3])).."/"..task_sys[task].count.."]
Monster To Hunt: "..getMonsterFromList(task_sys[task].monsters_list)..".
Itens Para Entrega: "..(#task_sys[task].items > 0 and getItemsFromList(task_sys[task].items) or "Nenhum")..".

[->] CURRENT TASK REWARDS [<-]

Reward Money: "..(task_sys[task].money > 0 and task_sys[task].money or 0).."
Reward Experiencia: "..(task_sys[task].exp > 0 and task_sys[task].exp or 0).."
Reward Points: "..task_sys[task].points.."
Redward Items: "..(#task_sys[task].reward > 0 and getItemsFromList(task_sys[task].reward) or "Nenhum item de recompensa")..".")
mod.event: domodlib('task_func') function onLook(cid, thing, position, lookDistance) if isPlayer(thing.uid) and getTaskPoints(thing.uid) > 0 then doPlayerSetSpecialDescription(thing.uid, "\n"..(getPlayerSex(thing.uid) == 0 and "She" or "He").. " is a "..GetRankTask(thing.uid)) end return true end

domodlib('task_func') function onKill(cid, target) if isPlayer(cid) and isMonster(target) then local t,daily = task_sys[getTaskMission(cid)], daily_task[getDailyTaskMission(cid)] if t and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, t.start) > 0 and isInArray(t.monsters_list, getCreatureName(target):lower()) and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3]) < t.count then setPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3], getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3]) < 0 and 1 or (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3])+1)) if getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[8]) <= 0 and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3]) < t.count then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE,"[Task System] defeated Total [" .. getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3]) .. "/" .. t.count .. "] da Task do " .. t.name .. ".") end if getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[3]) >= t.count then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE,"[Task System] Parabéns! Você terminou a Task do "..t.name..", volte ao npc parece receber sua recompensa.") end end if daily and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[7]) > 0 and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[6]) - os.time() >= 0 and isInArray(daily.monsters_list, getCreatureName(target):lower()) and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5]) < daily.count then setPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5], getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5]) < 0 and 1 or (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5])+1)) if getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[8]) <= 0 and getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5]) < daily.count then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_BLUE,"[Daily Task System] defeated Total [" .. getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5]) .. "/" .. daily.count .. "] da Task do " .. daily.name .. ".") end if getPlayerStorageValue(cid, task_sys_storages[5]) >= daily.count then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE,"[Daily Task System] Parabéns! Você terminou a Task do "..daily.name..", volte ao npc parece receber sua recompensa.") end end end return true end
